query: SELECT id, hostName, cuisineStyle, menuDescription, bio, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions, otherPassions FROM host_listings WHERE status = 'approved' AND (cuisineStyle LIKE '%dumpling%' OR menuDescription LIKE '%dumpling%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, hostName, cuisineStyle, menuDescription, bio, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions, otherPassions FROM host_listings WHERE status = 'approved' AND (cuisineStyle LIKE '%dumpling%' OR menuDescription LIKE '%dumpling%');
messages: 120001	Grace Tong	Dumpling class and tasting	Dumplings are a staple food for Chinese people. We don't just eat them during festivals like Chinese New Year and the Winter Solstice—we make them from scratch. Join us for this magical process as we transform flour and various ingredients into delicious dumplings.
It will be a home dining experience, meaning you will be invited to my home! It’s not commercial - it’s where I live, work, play and cook :)
Of course we will also be sharing our cultures as we meet. Look forward to the cultural exchanges!
P.S. We have different fillings for dumplings available:
1) Chives, egg, pork, shrimp (韭菜、鸡蛋、猪肉、虾仁)
2) Zucchini, egg, shrimp (西葫芦、鸡蛋、虾仁)
3) Zucchini, carrot, egg, shrimp (西葫芦、胡萝卜、鸡蛋、虾仁)
5) Fennel, dried tofu, egg (茴香、豆干、鸡蛋)

We can discuss and custom which fillings work for you!	Hi, I’m Grace. Born in Guizhou and shaped by more than a decade living abroad—mostly in the U.S.—I found my way back to Chinese cooking through a familiar homesickness: missing the flavors of home. Cooking authentic Chinese dishes became my love language, and after two years back in China, I’m excited to open my kitchen to fellow travelers from around the world. Come share a thoughtfully prepared meal, good conversation, and a genuine cultural exchange—one table, many stories.	NULL	NULL	NULL	NULL	NULL

120001	Grace Tong	Dumpling class and tasting	Dumplings are a staple food for Chinese people. We don't just eat them during festivals like Chinese New Year and the Winter Solstice—we make them from scratch. Join us for this magical process as we transform flour and various ingredients into delicious dumplings.

It will be a home dining experience, meaning you will be invited to my home! It’s not commercial - it’s where I live, work, play and cook :)

Of course we will also be sharing our cultures as we meet. Look forward to the cultural exchanges!

P.S. We have different fillings for dumplings available:

1) Chives, egg, pork, shrimp (韭菜、鸡蛋、猪肉、虾仁)
2) Zucchini, egg, shrimp (西葫芦、鸡蛋、虾仁)
3) Zucchini, carrot, egg, shrimp (西葫芦、胡萝卜、鸡蛋、虾仁)
4) Fennel, pork (茴香、猪肉)
5) Fennel, dried tofu, egg (茴香、豆干、鸡蛋)

We can discuss and custom which fillings work for you!	Hi, I’m Grace. Born in Guizhou and shaped by more than a decade living abroad—mostly in the U.S.—I found my way back to Chinese cooking through a familiar homesickness: missing the flavors of home. Cooking authentic Chinese dishes became my love language, and after two years back in China, I’m excited to open my kitchen to fellow travelers from around the world. Come share a thoughtfully prepared meal, good conversation, and a genuine cultural exchange—one table, many stories.	NULL	NULL	NULL	NULL	NULL
